title: Dark Reaper crisis

State]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] *[[Cydon Prax]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|If Dooku restores the Dark Reaper, it will mean the end of the Republic.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} The '''Dark Reaper crisis''' was a series of battles at the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==History== {{Quote|This battle may have turned the tide of the war.''"
"''Won the battle we have, but far from over, this war is.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|}} As the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were firing up, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] seemed to be at a deadlock. However, in a surprising move, the Separatists attacked the remote [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]]. As the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] soon discovered, it was the first step in a Confederacy plot to assemble the [[Dark Reaper]], an ancient [[Brotherhood of the Sith|Sith]] weapon of mass annihilation that absorbed its power from the life energies of the beings it killed. In an attempt to foil [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] scheme, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] led their forces on the scattered battlefronts of Rhen Var, [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], and [[Thule/Legends|Thule]]. They succeeded, but, as [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] pointed out, the war was far from over. ==Battles== *[[Evacuation of Rhen Var]] *[[Conquest of Raxus Prime]] *[[Battle on Alaris]] *[[Attack on Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)|Attack on Mon Calamari]] *[[Mirgoshir campaign|Attack on Agamar]] *[[Attack on Bakura]] *[[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|Battle of Rhen Var]] *[[Battle of Thule]] ==Appearances== [[File:Ruins_of_Kessia.jpg|thumb|right|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] overlooking the ruins of [[Kesiak]] at the end of the crisis]] *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} *''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{InsiderCite|68|Comics Link}} *{{FactFile|104|SUR 1-2|The Survival of Boba Fett}} *{{FactFile|107|SUR 3-6|The Survival of Boba Fett}} *{{FactFile|109|DEF 1-4|Defence of Kamino}} *{{FactFile|116|DOO 5-8|Count Dooku}} *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{1stID|Dark Reaper crisis}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|location|raxusprime|Raxus Prime}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' {{Imo}} *{{FactFile2014|6|22 BBY 75-80|Dark Side Influence}} *{{FactFile2014|11|SKY 23-26|Anakin Skywalker}} *{{FactFile2014|15|RAX 1-4|Raxus Prime}} *{{FactFile2014|40|19 BBY 15-20|Coruscant politics}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{CloneWarcampaigns}} [[Category:Clone Wars campaigns]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Battles of the Dark Reaper crisis]] }}
